title: hieracium tenuiramum
intro: Hieracium tenuiramum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North America. The medicinal properties of Hieracium tenuiramum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. Hieracium tenuiramum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
